senses.definition: a flat, narrow board made of wood, metal, etc. attached to a wall, to put items on

examples.x: She arranged her collection of porcelain figurines neatly on the living room shelf.
I installed a new shelf in the kitchen to store spices and cooking ingredients.
The bathroom shelf is stocked with towels, toiletries, and other essentials.
We need to buy brackets to support the heavy shelf for the garage.

senses.definition: a type of shelving unit that has a ladder-like design, with shelves gradually increasing in size from top to bottom and leaning against a wall for support

examples.x: The ladder shelf in the living room is perfect for displaying potted plants and framed photos.
She bought a wooden ladder shelf to organize her books and keep them within easy reach.
He used the top tier of the ladder shelf to place a decorative clock and a vase of flowers.
The metal ladder shelf in the bathroom holds towels, toiletries, and small baskets for storage.
They placed a ladder shelf in the entryway to store shoes, keys, and a few decorative accents.

senses.definition: a type of shelving unit that appears to be floating on a wall with no visible brackets or support, creating a sleek and minimalist look

examples.x: The floating shelf in the living room is perfect for displaying family photos and small plants.
She installed a floating shelf in the kitchen to hold her spices and cooking utensils.
The minimalist design of the floating shelf blends seamlessly with the modern decor.
He used a floating shelf to showcase his collection of vintage figurines.
A floating shelf near the entryway is a convenient spot for keys and mail.

senses.definition: a type of shelf that is attached directly to a wall or other vertical surface, providing a convenient and space-saving storage solution for books, decorative items, or other small items

examples.x: The books were neatly arranged on the wall shelf above the desk.
He built a custom wall shelf to showcase his collection of action figures.
The carpenter recommended a sturdy wall shelf to hold the heavy potted plants.
A simple wall shelf was mounted near the entryway for keys and small items.

senses.definition: a type of shelf that is designed to fit into the corner of a room or wall, providing a space-saving storage solution and a way to maximize the use of corner space

examples.x: She placed her favorite books on the corner shelf in her bedroom.
The kitchen corner shelf holds all the spices for easy access while cooking.
A glass corner shelf in the bathroom is ideal for storing soaps and toiletries.
The triangular corner shelf in the office keeps the desk clear and organized.
The corner shelf in the living room is perfect for displaying small plants and decorative items.

senses.definition: a custom-designed shelving unit that is integrated into a specific space within a room

examples.x: The living room has a beautiful built-in shelf that holds all my favorite books.
The built-in shelves in the hallway provide a perfect place to display family photos.
I decided to add a built-in shelf in the kitchen to store extra spices and jars.
The cozy reading nook features a built-in shelf that holds a collection of novels.
The built-in shelves in the bathroom are ideal for storing towels and toiletries.

senses.definition: a type of shelving made of wire materials, such as steel or aluminum, that is often used in commercial and industrial settings or for organizing storage spaces in homes

examples.x: The closet is organized with wire shelves that allow for easy visibility and access to my shoes.
We installed wire shelves in the garage to store cleaning supplies and tools.
The office has a set of wire shelves for organizing files and office supplies.
The bathroom cabinet features wire shelves that hold towels and toiletries.
She uses wire shelves in her kitchen to store extra pots and pans.

senses.definition: ‌a board connected to a wall or a piece of furniture on which books are kept

examples.x: She organized her collection of novels neatly on the bookshelf in the living room.
The bookshelf in the study was filled with textbooks and academic journals.
They installed floating bookshelves in the children's room to encourage reading.

senses.definition: a freestanding bookshelf designed to fit into a corner of a room, providing space-saving storage for books or decorative items

examples.x: She placed her favorite novels on the corner bookshelf, adding a cozy touch to the living room.
The corner bookshelf in the study was perfect for storing both books and decorative pieces.
He found the corner bookshelf to be a great space-saving solution for his small apartment.
I love how the corner bookshelf blends in with the rest of the room while maximizing storage.
The corner bookshelf gave the room a more open feel, as it didn’t take up much space.

senses.definition: a custom-designed shelving unit that is integrated into a wall or alcove within a room for seamless and space-saving storage of books or other items

examples.x: The living room features a built-in bookshelf that stretches across one entire wall.
She loves the built-in bookshelf in her office because it keeps all her books organized.
We decided to install a built-in bookshelf in the living room to save space and add style.
The new house has a built-in bookshelf in the hallway, perfect for displaying family photos.
The built-in bookshelf adds a cozy touch to the study, making it feel more like a library.

senses.definition: a freestanding bookshelf that rotates around its axis, providing easy access to books or other items from different angles

examples.x: The revolving bookcase made it easy to access all my books without taking up much space in the room.
She spun the revolving bookcase to find the novel she wanted to read.
The compact size of the revolving bookcase allowed it to fit perfectly into the small apartment.
As he turned the revolving bookcase, he discovered more hidden treasures among the shelves.

senses.definition: a type of bookcase that features multiple shelves, each with a glass door that lifts up and slides back into the case, allowing easy access to the books inside

examples.x: The barrister bookcase in the office was filled with leather-bound law books and antique volumes.
She carefully placed her favorite novels in the barrister bookcase to keep them safe from dust.
I found an old barrister bookcase at the antique shop and couldn’t resist buying it for my library.
He opened the barrister bookcase to grab a reference book for his research.

senses.definition: a storage unit designed to hold and organize wine bottles, made of various materials and available in different sizes and styles

examples.x: She carefully arranged her collection of vintage wines on the wooden wine rack in the dining room.
The small wine rack on the counter is perfect for holding a few bottles for easy access.
He bought a stylish metal wine rack to complement the modern design of his living room.
The wine rack in the cellar is built into the wall, keeping the bottles at the perfect temperature.
After organizing the wine rack, they found they had space for a few more bottles to add to their collection.

senses.definition: a simple device made of metal or plastic, designed to hold or hang items such as coats, towels, or tools, by catching onto a loop or ring on the item
a freestanding furniture piece with hooks or prongs for hanging hats and sometimes additional storage for other items like coats or scarves

examples.x: She placed her favorite fedora on the hat stand by the door.
The hat stand in the hallway is always cluttered with coats and scarves.
He grabbed his winter hat from the hat stand before heading out into the snow.
The antique hat stand added a touch of elegance to the entryway.
I hung my new sun hat on the hat stand after returning from the garden.

senses.definition: a small device made of metal or plastic with a knob or hook that is used to hang coats, jackets, hats, or other items

examples.x: She hung her coat on the coat peg near the door before entering the house.
The coat peg in the hallway was filled with jackets and scarves.
He reached for his umbrella, which was neatly hanging on the coat peg.
The children hung their coats on the coat pegs when they arrived at school.
There is a coat peg by the entrance for guests to leave their outerwear.

senses.definition: a furniture piece designed to hold coats and hats, typically with hooks or pegs, and sometimes additional storage for shoes or umbrellas

examples.x: She hung her jacket on the coat stand by the door as she entered the house.
The coat stand in the hallway was full of hats, coats, and scarves.
After arriving at the party, he placed his coat on the nearest coat stand.
I need to buy a new coat stand for the entryway to keep everything organized.
There was barely enough space on the coat stand for everyone’s jackets at the gathering.

senses.definition: a freestanding furniture piece with a pole for hanging clothes, a tray for holding small items, and sometimes additional storage for shoes or hats

examples.x: He placed his suit on the valet stand before heading to the bathroom.
The valet stand in the hallway kept his clothes neat and organized for the next day.
She hung her jacket and scarf on the valet stand as soon as she came in from the cold.
The valet stand was perfect for hanging his clothes overnight, preventing wrinkles.

senses.definition: a small device, typically made of metal or plastic, designed to hold and organize belts, often featuring a series of hooks or prongs to hang the belts on

examples.x: I keep all my belts neatly arranged on a belt hanger in my closet.
The belt hanger helps prevent my belts from getting tangled with other accessories.
He installed a belt hanger on the inside of his wardrobe door for easy access.
She placed her new leather belts on the belt hanger to keep them in good condition.
I found a stylish belt hanger made of wood that matches the rest of my closet furniture.

senses.definition: a small device with a hook that can be hung on a table or other surface to hold and organize purses and handbags

examples.x: She hung her handbag on the purse hook by the door as she entered the house.
The café offered purse hooks under the tables, so customers could keep their bags off the floor.
I installed a purse hook in my closet to keep my bags organized and easily accessible.
At the restaurant, I noticed purse hooks on the back of the chairs for guests to hang their bags.
The purse hook on the wall near the entryway made it convenient to grab my bag on the way out.

senses.definition: a device or storage solution designed to hold and organize scarves, typically featuring a series of hooks, loops, or other compartments to neatly store and display scarves

examples.x: The scarf organizer has multiple hooks, making it easy to find the right one without digging through drawers.
He hung his scarves on the scarf organizer by the door so they are easy to grab when heading out.
A scarf organizer is perfect for keeping delicate fabrics from getting stretched or damaged.
I need to buy a scarf organizer for my closet since my scarves are always getting tangled.
She used a scarf organizer to keep her collection of scarves neatly arranged in the closet.

senses.definition: a device or storage solution designed to hold and organize shoes, typically featuring compartments, shelves, or pockets to neatly store and display shoes

examples.x: I bought a shoe organizer to keep my closet neat and make it easier to find my favorite pairs.
She used a wall-mounted shoe organizer to maximize space in her hallway.
The shoe organizer under the bed saved me a lot of space in my small apartment.
After organizing my shoes in a shoe organizer, I no longer have to dig through a pile to find a match.
I need a bigger shoe organizer since my collection has grown over the years.

senses.definition: a device with hooks or bars to hang clothes and items over the top of a door for storage

examples.x: I hung my jacket on the over-the-door clothes hanger to keep it out of the way.
The over-the-door clothes hanger is perfect for organizing my scarves and hats.
She used an over-the-door clothes hanger to save space in her tiny apartment.
I keep my bag on the over-the-door clothes hanger so I can grab it easily when I leave.

senses.definition: a device or storage solution designed to hold and display towels, typically featuring bars or hooks to hang towels from

examples.x: She hung her bath towel on the towel rack to dry after her shower.
The bathroom was spacious, with a sleek chrome towel rack beside the sink.
I need to install a towel rack in the guest bathroom for extra storage.
The hotel room had several neatly arranged towels on the towel rack.
He reached for a clean towel from the towel rack after his workout.

senses.definition: a piece of furniture or structure that is designed to hold, support, or display something, such as clothing, accessories, or other items
a piece of furniture placed in entryways to hang coats, store shoes, and organize other items

examples.x: The hallstand by the door provides a convenient place to hang my coat and store my shoes.
She placed her purse and umbrella on the hallstand as she took off her coat.
The hallstand has a mirror, making it easy to check my appearance before heading out.
He hung his jacket on the hook of the hallstand and sat down to put on his shoes.
We added a hallstand to our entryway to keep the space organized and welcoming.

senses.definition: a freestanding holder designed to store umbrellas, available in various sizes and styles to match different décor styles

examples.x: She placed her wet umbrella in the umbrella stand by the door.
The entryway looked tidier with the elegant umbrella stand holding all the umbrellas.
The umbrella stand in the hallway was made of polished metal and matched the décor.
The umbrella stand had enough space to hold several umbrellas for guests.
A decorative umbrella stand near the entrance added a stylish touch to the foyer.

senses.definition: a storage unit designed to hold and organize shoes, made of wood, metal, or plastic, and available in different sizes and styles

examples.x: She placed her new shoes neatly on the shoe rack by the door.
The shoe rack in the hallway is almost full of winter boots.
He added a second tier to the shoe rack to make more space for his sneakers.
I like how the shoe rack helps keep my closet organized and free of clutter.
The shoe rack by the entrance is perfect for storing shoes when guests arrive.

senses.definition: a framework, typically with rails, hooks, or pegs, on which items can be hung
a storage unit with cube-shaped compartments for organizing and displaying items

examples.x: The living room looks much tidier with the new cube shelf for storing books and knick-knacks.
She placed the vase on the top compartment of the cube shelf to add a decorative touch.
The cube shelf in the entryway is perfect for organizing shoes and bags.
We need to buy a cube shelf to help organize the kids’ toys in the playroom.
